maintenanceRequests.title: Possible electrical fixture or outlet issue
maintenanceRequests.timeline: Avoid using the affected fixture and route to a licensed electrician if heat, smoke, sparking, or exposed wiring is present. Estimated planning range: $150 - $1,100.
maintenanceRequests.accessNotes: AI draft: confirm entry permission, pets, and whether the issue is actively worsening before dispatch.
maintenanceRequests.description: Photos suggest an electrical maintenance concern. Check for tripped breakers, warm outlets, flickering fixtures, exposed wiring, or scorch marks. for Old Brook. Generated from 1 uploaded photo and should be confirmed during triage.

inspections.notes: Flooring gouges, wall patching, and entry door frame damage observed.

damageAssessments.summary: High-severity turnover assessment with likely flooring damage, wall damage, and door/window damage impacts.
damageAssessments.explanation: Observed issues exceed routine wear thresholds and likely require localized framing repair, patch/paint, and plank replacement in a visible traffic zone. Estimate is directional and should be validated by contractor bids.
damageAssessments.recommendedNext: Obtain two contractor estimates, preserve photo documentation, and reconcile against security deposit schedule before issuing the final accounting.
damageAssessments.damageCategories: flooring damage, wall damage, door/window damage
